error_signature: errors in console in the live app
title: Errors during Stripe payment confirmation
symptom: When attempting to confirm a payment with a page ID in the URL, errors appear in the console of the live app.
applies_when: Using Stripe Elements for payment confirmation
Page ID is included in the URL
not_this_if: No errors occur when using a static return URL
root_cause: The default confirm payment action in WeWeb does not support dynamic parameters in the return URL, leading to errors when trying to bind the page ID and UUID manually.
fix_steps: Implement the provided JavaScript workaround for confirming payments.
Ensure the return_url is set correctly based on the environment (editor or published).
Test the payment confirmation in both the editor and live environments.
agent_instruction: Use the JavaScript workaround to set the return URL dynamically based on the environment.
